components.name: ProgressRing
components.notes: Visualizes goal relation and current completion state.

components.name: MetricCard
components.notes: Displays one trackable metric with value, unit, goal relation, trend, and explanation.

components.name: TrendCard
components.notes: Explains long-term direction without reducing the interface to raw chart display.

components.name: AwardBadge
components.notes: Turns repeated behavior into visible reward evidence.

components.name: WorkoutItem
components.notes: Represents one completed behavior record in a list or history surface.
